name: anchor
voice: the quiet professional — a verbatim rail that simply reads (2-frame fade-ups, accent emphasis), and one climax that settles into the scene behind the subject with a drawn accent underline. No spectacle: discipline IS the style. The conservative default for must-read / explainer clips.
when: explainers, tutorials, product walkthroughs, corporate and news-adjacent clips — anywhere every word must be read and nothing should show off. Pick it when unsure.
